sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 stage controller address generator for butterfly operands and twiddle index.
sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used when loading DIT FFT input memory.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for the N=16 FFT.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT and IFFT twiddle sign support.
